obstacle_groups.label: Upper terrace 1 — y=2, x=10..14, touches right edge
Upper terrace 2 — y=5, x=7..14, touches right edge
Upper terrace 3 — y=8, x=4..14, touches right edge
Lower terrace 4 — y=12, x=0..10, touches left edge
Lower terrace 5 — y=15, x=0..7, touches left edge
Lower terrace 6 — y=18, x=0..4, touches left and near-bottom edges
Right top corner — x=14, y=0..1, touches top and right edges
Right bottom corner — x=14, y=18..19, touches bottom and right edges
